thought.text: 我将查看重点性能样例结构，确定最有效的安全优化。

action.command: for f in const-propagation instruction-combining integer-divide-optimization dead-code-elimination hoist if-combine; do echo ===$f source head===; sed -n '1,140p' /workspace/YatCC/test/cases/performance/$f.sysu.c; echo ===$f source tail===; tail -80 /workspace/YatCC/test/cases/performance/$f.sysu.c; done

tool_call.name: terminal
